calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:17am
Small Claims Appeals, Judge Pro Tem Debra Daniloff, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Caras S. Sandoval, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., appears through representative, Richard Weiner. Also present is Yellow Cab driver Suleyman Durson for Respondent, and Keith Peters (Liberty Mutual Insur. Co.) present with Appellant. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Pro Tem Michelle McGee, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 506, Nothing on record: Cause called for Small Claims: Plaintiff, Yellow Cab Cooperative, appearing through Richard Weiner, in Pro Per; Defendant, Caras S. Sandoval, appears in Pro Per. A witness, Suleyman Dursan, appears for Plaintiff. Exhibits for pltf & deft retained.
